title: Silky Smoky Ukrainian Beef Stew
description: A savory, silky slow‑cooked beef stew with a hint of smoke, topped with miniature marshmallows for a playful twist. Perfect for midnight cravings and keto diners alike.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and brown the beef cubes until all sides are seared, about 5‑7 minutes.

Transfer the browned beef to a slow cooker. In the skillet, sauté diced onion, minced garlic, and celery root until softened, about 3 minutes. Add smoked paprika, ground coriander, and stir for 30 seconds.
Pour the sautéed vegetables into the slow cooker. Stir in tomato paste, beef broth, and salt, ensuring the tomato paste is fully incorporated.
Cover and cook on low for 4 hours, or until the beef is tender and the flavors meld.
About 15 minutes before serving, stir in miniature marshmallows. They will soften and add a gentle sweetness to the stew.
Taste and adjust seasoning with additional salt or pepper if needed. Garnish with fresh parsley if desired before serving.
Serve hot, spooning the silky sauce over the beef.
Enjoy your keto‑friendly, smoky, and silky Ukrainian delight!
